title: Fabulously, Minecraft!
description: Finally, a trailer inspired modpack that runs well!
body:
## Finally, a **trailer inspired** modpack that runs well!

This modpack is designed for midrange to low end **PCs** and **Gaming Laptops** but _may_ run well on **Potato** machines without shaders enabled.

### About the lack of updates...
I'm currently working on another modpack, this will get updated with bugfixes at some point.

Updated to **1.20.4**!

This modpack features :
1. Great sound design and ambient sounds
2. Incedibly satisfying camera movements
3. Flat syle textures, similar to the trailers
4. Well configured shaders for the best performance to quality
5. Fullbright by pressing "N" (This doesn't work with shaders on!)
6. Insanely fast world generation times
7. Great server compatiblilty
8. Still Minecraft at it's core (No worldgen changes or new items!)
9. It's good enough to daily play! (I actually use it!)
10. Server backwards and forwards compatibility! (No need to update to play your favorite servers!)

Credit and thanks to **RedPierre** for creating [Element](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/element-6068529/)!
